caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, over-ear headphones, and a dark green t-shirt with the text "ION NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK" sits in a studio setting. He is speaking and gesturing with his hands while positioned in front of a professional black microphone. Behind him, the room contains several framed photos on the wall, clothing racks, and a white mannequin wearing a white shirt. Small logos are visible in the bottom corners of the scene, including one that reads "BOLLY". Throughout the sequence, the man's facial expressions and hand positions shift as he continues to talk, moving his arms in a descriptive manner. The camera remains stationary, capturing him from the chest up as he engages in a conversation within the studio environment.
